heading: Restriction, abandonment, cancellation, or expiration of a basic application or basic registration
label: 1141c Restriction, abandonment, cancellation, or expiration of a basic application or basic registration

children.text: within 5 years after the international registration date; or

more than 5 years after the international registration date if the restriction, abandonment, or cancellation of the basic application or basic registration resulted from an action that began before the end of that 5-year period.
